abstract.t: This document specifies a rate notification mechanism for Segment Routing over IPv6 (SRv6) networks. It enables a transit or egress node to dynamically notify the ingress (headend) node about a recommended rate range (MinRate and MaxRate) when localized congestion is detected or when underutilized bandwidth is identified, allowing the headend to perform proactive traffic shaping and rate enforcement. This mechanism enhances transmission efficiency in SRv6 networks by enabling fine-grained, congestion-aware rate control.
